sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67355" key="mh/kunsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μήκυν-σις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n67355.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lengthening</tr_>, in prosody, Sch.D.T.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.49</biblScope> </bibl> H.</sense> </entryFree>
